question: Which vote happened first in 2026: Malta's snap general election or the first round of Colombia's presidential election?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer: Malta's snap general election happened first. It was held on **30 May 2026**, one day before Colombia's presidential election first round on **31 May 2026** ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/world/voting-starts-malta-parliamentary-elections-ruling-party-set-win-2026-05-30/); [Congress.gov CRS](https://www.congress.gov/crs-product/IN12689)).

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**Malta’s snap general election happened first**, on **May 30, 2026**. Colombia’s first-round presidential vote followed on **May 31, 2026**—one day later.

Sources: [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/world/voting-starts-malta-parliamentary-elections-ruling-party-set-win-2026-05-30/) and [U.S. Congress](https://www.congress.gov/crs-product/IN12689).
